name: Rundll32 Suspicious Execution
description: Detects rundll32.exe executing DLLs from suspicious locations or with unusual exports
query:
// Detect rundll32 executing DLLs from temp or user directories
// Trigger on rundll32 with suspicious DLL paths
events from edr_process
where exe_path matches "(?i)rundll32\.exe$"
  and cmdline matches "(?i)(\\temp\\|\\tmp\\|\\downloads\\|\\appdata\\|\\users\\.*\\desktop\\|javascript:|http://|https://)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
